{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Monarch Shen
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Monarch Shen]] has [[Dreadgod]] teams.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
